race.comment: MIDNIGHT RABBLE (11) is going along well and wound up nicely last time over 1000m at Warren to finish fourth after putting two on the bounce at Moree. Draw is a bit sticky but he gets in well with the 2kg claim again. Bold showing anticipated. CITY GOLD SPEED (8) has shown improvement in his last two and should be even better now with the added fitness. Sharpened by the blinkers going on first time. Can give this a big shake. ROTHGATE (1) has been better in his last two. Has good early speed and can give a sight. RIVER ROGUE (15) caught the eye last start when launching home from a long way off them. Drawn kinder this time and is worth keeping in mind.
